sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Fix outer (0,2) from b to R
predict(expect_change=True, note='Fix outer grid (0,2) back to R')
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 38, 'col': 54}])

# Check state
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("After fixing (0,2):")
print("Outer grid:")
for r in [38, 46, 54]:
    c0 = lines[r][36:42]
    c1 = lines[r][44:50]
    c2 = lines[r][52:58]
    print(f"  {r}: {c0} {c1} {c2}")

print("Level completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
